Text: Decision adopted by the Committee under the Optional Protocol to the International Covenant on Economic, Social and Cultural Rights, concerning communication No. 29/2018[[fn:1]]*

Footnotes.text: *Adopted by the Committee at its sixty-seventh session (17 February–6 March 2020).

Text: At its meeting on 5 March 2020, the Committee, having noted the author’s withdrawal of the communication, decided to discontinue its consideration of communication No. 29/2018, in accordance with rule 17 of its provisional rules of procedure under the Optional Protocol.
